# Niraj Patil — Product Manager Portfolio

> Portfolio of Niraj Patil, an AI Product Manager building data-driven products with quantified impact across AI, SaaS, and consulting.

Niraj Patil is an AI Product Manager and founder. This site showcases featured work (HawkAI, Zeno, AI Onboarding Copilot, Personalized RecSys-LLM, AWS Airbnb Insights, Federated Healthcare Recsys), career experience, skills across product, data science, engineering, and consulting, plus a downloadable resume.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, featured work, experience, skills, education, and contact in a single-page portfolio.

## Resources

- [Resume (PDF)](/Niraj_Patil_Resume.pdf): Latest resume covering product, AI, and engineering experience.
